creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: nobutaka
Date: Sat Jan 26 10:37:03 2013
New Revision: 311002
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311002

Log:
  Update to the snapshot on 2012/09/23.
  
  PR:		ports/175264
  Submitted by:	Christopher J. Ruwe <cjr@cruwe.de>

Modified:
  head/mail/wanderlust-devel/Makefile
  head/mail/wanderlust-devel/distinfo
  head/mail/wanderlust-devel/pkg-plist

Modified: head/mail/wanderlust-devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/wanderlust-devel/Makefile	Sat Jan 26 10:27:23 2013	(r311001)
+++ head/mail/wanderlust-devel/Makefile	Sat Jan 26 10:37:03 2013	(r311002)
@@ -1,15 +1,10 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	Wanderlust
-# Date created:		26 Sep 2009
-# Whom: 		MANTANI Nobutaka <nobutaka@FreeBSD.org>
-#
+# Created by: MANTANI Nobutaka <nobutaka@FreeBSD.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	wanderlust
 PORTVERSION=	2.15.9.b.${SNAPDATE}
-PORTREVISION=	4
 CATEGORIES=	mail elisp
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.jpl.org/elips/wl/snapshots/ \
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.jpl.org/ftp/pub/github-snapshots/ \
 		${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	nobutaka
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}
@@ -23,8 +18,8 @@ LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 
 USE_EMACS=	yes
 
-SNAPDATE=	20120102
-SNAPTIME=	0309
+SNAPDATE=	20120923
+SNAPTIME=	0900
 
 CONFLICTS=	wanderlust-*-2.14.*
 NO_LATEST_LINK=	yes
@@ -62,7 +57,7 @@ WL_ICONDIR=	${EMACS_LIBDIR_WITH_VER}/etc
 STARTUPDIR=	${EMACS_VERSION_SITE_LISPDIR}
 
 DOCSDIR_JA=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/ja/wanderlust
-DOCS=		README NEWS doc/wl.texi
+DOCS=		README.md NEWS doc/wl.texi
 DOCS_JA=	README.ja NEWS.ja doc/wl-ja.texi
 EXAMPLESLANG=	en ja
 EXAMPLES=	dot.addresses dot.folders dot.wl

Modified: head/mail/wanderlust-devel/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/wanderlust-devel/distinfo	Sat Jan 26 10:27:23 2013	(r311001)
+++ head/mail/wanderlust-devel/distinfo	Sat Jan 26 10:37:03 2013	(r311002)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (wanderlust-201201020309.tar.gz) = 9130d3c99d9a02fc650d40fba27dd6ee69f52bb749fb074cd21c597344043294
-SIZE (wanderlust-201201020309.tar.gz) = 1146152
+SHA256 (wanderlust-201209230900.tar.gz) = 203ed484b0c8ef621555eb5f6177e5329d78c723ec40a1d9202c205cdeb87967
+SIZE (wanderlust-201209230900.tar.gz) = 1148046

Modified: head/mail/wanderlust-devel/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/wanderlust-devel/pkg-plist	Sat Jan 26 10:27:23 2013	(r311001)
+++ head/mail/wanderlust-devel/pkg-plist	Sat Jan 26 10:37:03 2013	(r311002)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR_JA%%/README.ja
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR_JA%%/wl-ja.texi
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/NEWS
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README.md
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/wl.texi
 %%WL_LISPDIR%%/acap.el
 %%WL_LISPDIR%%/acap.elc
